DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLTFF IN PRO-PER PRESENTED PRIMA FACIE CASE. JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFTENDANT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES, $2974.99 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES, AND $80.00 COSTS. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RESTICK, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1961 SUTTER STREET #2, SN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $2,974.99 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,054.99, LEASE FORFEITED
